name_en: Dior top-tier imported original factory embroidery shoulder bag, new Dior Besace series🖤 super charming 😑 the new handbag reveals a soft luxurious temperament~ the gold CD logo buckle adds a touch of eye-catching high-class feeling to the simple design 🌚 both black and Monogram styles are very durable and good-looking~ every time you wear it, you can feel the soft lines and graceful design language!
name_cn:
Dior top-tier imported original factory embroidery shoulder bag, new Dior Besace series🖤 super charming 😑 the new handbag reveals a soft luxurious temperament~ the gold CD logo buckle adds a touch of eye-catching high-class feeling to the simple design 🌚 both black and Monogram styles are very durable and good-looking~ every time you wear it, you can feel the soft lines and graceful design language!
Size:24*15*6cm
